questions.question: Explain the difference between internal and external fragmentation with examples
keyPoints: Internal: Wasted space within allocated blocks (e.g., 4KB page with 3KB used)
External: Free memory gaps between allocations (e.g., 50KB free but scattered)

questions.question: Compare and contrast paging and segmentation with respect to implementation and fragmentation
keyPoints: Paging: Fixed-size blocks, no external fragmentation, hardware implementation
Segmentation: Variable-size blocks, matches program structure, needs compaction
